name: First State Bank Minnesota
description_short: First State Bank Minnesota is a hometown community bank offering online and mobile banking services with locations in LeRoy and Spring Valley, Minnesota.
description_long: First State Bank Minnesota operates as a traditional community bank serving Minnesota residents through physical branches in LeRoy and Spring Valley. The bank positions itself as a "Hometown Community Bank" focused on personalized service and local banking relationships. According to their website, they emphasize peace of mind and customer security as core values in their operations. The bank offers standard retail banking services including online banking with user account access, mobile banking via smartphone app, eStatements, online bill pay, and debit card services. Customers can access their accounts remotely to check balances, make transfers, and manage finances through multiple digital channels. The bank accepts customers through online access setup for new users who want to establish accounts. First State Bank Minnesota distinguishes itself through emphasis on security and customer education, referencing OnGuard Online resources and maintaining what they describe as critical online safety practices. They offer incentives for digital account management, including eStatements positioned as an environmentally friendly alternative to paper statements. Mobile banking is provided free of charge, positioning it as a convenience feature rather than a premium service. As a small community bank with only two documented branch locations, First State Bank Minnesota has limited geographic reach and likely offers a more restricted product suite compared to regional or national banks. The website content does not provide information about specific loan products, investment services, interest rates, fees, or deposit insurance details. For consumers seeking comprehensive banking services or those outside the LeRoy and Spring Valley service areas, options may be limited.
services: Online banking with user ID login and new account setup
In-person banking at Spring Valley branch
pros: Free mobile banking app available for smartphone access to accounts anytime, anywhere
Online bill pay service for convenient payment processing
eStatements option available to reduce paper and support environmental sustainability
Emphasis on online security and customer education through OnGuard Online resources
Local community bank structure with personalized relationship banking approach
Multiple contact methods available at two branch locations (LeRoy: 507-324-5260; Spring Valley: 507-346-9836)
Debit card access for quick account transactions
cons: Only two branch locations (LeRoy and Spring Valley) limits geographic accessibility
Website does not disclose specific loan products, rates, or fees
No information provided about savings account interest rates or CD terms
Paper statements may require fees in the future, shifting costs to traditional customers
Limited information about deposit insurance protection and account types offered

contact.address: 102 W Main St, Le Roy, MN 55951

best_for: Residents of LeRoy or Spring Valley, Minnesota seeking local community banking
Customers who prioritize digital banking access and mobile convenience
Individuals interested in a personalized banking relationship with local decision-makers
Tech-savvy consumers comfortable with online and mobile-first banking platforms
diagnosis: First State Bank Minnesota is best for residents of LeRoy or Spring Valley seeking a community-focused bank with strong digital banking capabilities. The primary caveat is that the bank's two-location footprint and limited website information suggest it may not be suitable for customers outside these specific areas or those needing comprehensive product information before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
